name: Reggie Ray
bio: Reggie Ray is a Buddhist teacher and the founder of Dharma Ocean Foundation in Crestone, Colorado. He was a student of Chögyam Trungpa Rinpoche and holds a PhD in Buddhist studies from the University of Chicago. He was a professor at Naropa University for many years. His teaching emphasizes somatic meditation and the body's role in awakening. His books include 'Touching Enlightenment,' 'Indestructible Truth,' and 'Secret of the Vajra World.'
